query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'professional') AS total_professionals,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "professionalTenants") AS total_links,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "professionalId") FROM "professionalTenants") AS linked_professionals;
